name: coding
description: General instructions for creating code
---

# Instructions for Code Generation

When creating files, use the create_file tool. Prefer deleting and creating files using create_file over edit_file when the change is large or the file is new. When editing files, use edit_file and provide a diff in unified format. Always include the full path to the file in the filename field. Do not include deleted lines in the diff. When creating or editing files, ensure that the content is valid and does not contain syntax errors.
